category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Nigeria under SON / SONCAP.

title.en: China-to-Nigeria Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入尼日利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入奈及利亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Nigeria SON / SONCAP requirements, including NIS IEC 62841 safety, EMC, market access, noise, RoHS-type substances, and cordless battery and radio obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与尼日利亚 SON / SONCAP 要求差距对照，涵盖 NIS IEC 62841 安全、电磁兼容、市场准入、噪声、RoHS 类物质，以及无绳电池和无线电义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與奈及利亞 SON / SONCAP 要求差距對照，涵蓋 NIS IEC 62841 安全、電磁相容、市場准入、噪聲、RoHS 類物質，以及無繩電池和無線電義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Nigerian law, SONCAP procedures, NIS standards, battery and radio obligations, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行尼日利亚法律、SONCAP 程序、NIS 标准、电池及无线电义务，以及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行奈及利亞法律、SONCAP 程序、NIS 標準、電池及無線電義務，以及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Nigeria, the mandatory baseline is SONCAP under the Standards Organisation of Nigeria: a Product Certificate plus a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate are required before customs clearance, with conformity assessed against NIS standards that adopt IEC, typically NIS IEC 62841 for tool safety. Cordless tools with radio functions also require NCC type approval, and an in-country importer is needed.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入尼日利亚，强制基线是尼日利亚标准组织（SON）下的 SONCAP：清关前须取得产品证书加每批货物的 SONCAP 证书，合格评定依据采纳 IEC 的 NIS 标准，工具安全通常对应 NIS IEC 62841。带无线电功能的无绳工具还须取得 NCC 型号核准，并需要尼日利亚本地进口商。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入奈及利亞，強制基線是奈及利亞標準組織（SON）下的 SONCAP：清關前須取得產品證書加每批貨物的 SONCAP 證書，合格評定依據採納 IEC 的 NIS 標準，工具安全通常對應 NIS IEC 62841。帶無線電功能的無繩工具還須取得 NCC 型號核准，並需要奈及利亞本地進口商。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
